goals.title: FE/app login to USER home MVP. Scope: FE/app only. Implement mock-fir...
goals.objective: FE/app login to USER home MVP. Scope: FE/app only. Implement mock-first login and home UI for iPhone 8 375x667. Do not edit docs/api/final.md, BE, ML, or FE/wearable. Criteria: USER login reaches home; invalid login shows Korean error; GUARDIAN login reaches placeholder not USER home; 375x667 layout has no horizontal clipping; lint/test/build pass.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use via Chrome headless CDP: open http://127.0.0.1:5173 at viewport 375x667, login USER user@example.com/password1234, expect Able Band 홈, safety message, emergency button, and scrollWidth<=innerWidth.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: RED: npm run test initially failed 6 App flow tests against Users Table. GREEN: npm run test passed 6/6. Browser: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/browser-qa-log.json scenario user-home and .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/qa-user-home-375x667.png show Able Band 홈, safety status, emergency button, scrollWidth=375 innerWidth=375. cleanup: killed QA Chrome/dev-server child; removed chrome profile; pre-existing 5173 listener left untouched.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use via Chrome headless CDP: open http://127.0.0.1:5173 at viewport 375x667, submit wrong@example.com/wrong, expect Korean invalid-login error and login heading still visible.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: RED: npm run test initially failed invalid login flow because login form was absent. GREEN: npm run test passed 6/6. Browser: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/browser-qa-log.json scenario invalid-login shows Korean error and login heading remains. cleanup: killed QA Chrome/dev-server child; removed chrome profile; pre-existing 5173 listener left untouched.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use via Chrome headless CDP: open http://127.0.0.1:5173 at viewport 375x667, login GUARDIAN guardian@example.com/password1234, expect guardian placeholder and no USER home; also verify lint/test/build pass.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/browser-qa-log.json scenario guardian-placeholder plus npm lint/test/build output
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: RED: npm run test initially failed guardian routing because role controls were absent. GREEN: npm run test passed 6/6; npm run lint passed; npm run build passed. Browser: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/browser-qa-log.json scenario guardian-placeholder and .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/qa-guardian-375x667.png show guardian placeholder and no USER home. cleanup: killed QA Chrome/dev-server child; removed chrome profile; pre-existing 5173 listener left untouched.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
